LAW AND MOTION 301, ARGUED. DEFENDANT JULIO RODRIGUEZ'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND- COURT CONTINUED MATTER FROM MAR-13-2006 TO MAR-20-2006, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301. DECLARATION OF RICHARD S MILLER IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO RECONSIDER MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY RESPONDENT RODRIGUEZ, JULIO DBA SOPHIE'S CREPE

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: RESPONDENT JULIO RODRIGUEZ' MOTION TO RECONSIDER ORDER DENYING MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED FOR INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE. "I CAUSED" PROOF OF SERVICE TO BE MAILED AND HAD SERVED DOES NOT SHOW PERSONAL AND MAIL SERVICE. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINN, RENEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JULIO DBA SOPHIE'S CREPE $25,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $343.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,343.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
